author: y4rr
content: Sprint A.1 complete. #828 fixed: XpuDevice::is_available() now probes wgpu adapter list via catch_unwind(CubeRuntime::new(Wgpu(0)).is_ok()) instead of cfg!(feature='wgpu'). cascade_skip removed from xpu_is_available_matches_fixture. Pre-existing clippy::type_complexity in all_op_symbols_resolve suppressed with targeted allow. Commit cee5cea4. #829-836 closed-as-deferred with result comments. All 38 ferrotorch-xpu tests pass, clippy clean. No other crates touched.
